name: Price Increase Announcement (Enterprise Customers)
seed_content: Starting Q3, NexaVault pricing will increase by 18% to support expanded infrastructure and new security features.
prediction_question: How should we frame this price increase to minimize churn and negative sentiment?
expected_behavior: The system should find that leading with value addition (new features) before mentioning price scores better on reward response and lower on threat detection than leading with the price change.
